commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=17cad1a07014fa8e855e559b4231828f46e24c8c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch moves default-account routing warnings into doctor preview aggregation, adds a core doctor lint health check, registers it under gateway-services, removes direct `doctor-config-flow` emission, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +74. Total +98 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main emits these warnings before the repair branch, while this PR removes that call and the replacement health-check id is not executed by the custom gateway-services doctor contribution run. I did not run CLI commands because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the PR needs contributor-supplied real CLI proof and a repair-mode warning fix before it can be merge-ready.

target.title: fix(doctor): surface multi-account default routing warnings in preview and lint
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves
Fixes an issue where `openclaw doctor` preview and `openclaw doctor --lint` did not surface warnings about multi-account channels that lack explicit default routing or complete account-scoped bindings.

## Why This Change Was Made
Surface `collectMissingDefaultAccountBindingWarnings` and `collectMissingExplicitDefaultAccountWarnings` through `collectDoctorPreviewNotes` so both preview and lint paths show routing warnings. Removed the duplicate direct calls from `doctor-config-flow` — the preview/lint path surfaces them via the health check contribution, and the repair path via the ordered doctor checks. Single source of truth, no duplicate output.

## User Impact
Operators running `openclaw doctor` preview or `openclaw doctor --lint` now see warnings when multi-account channels lack explicit default routing.

## Evidence

**Non-repair path (preview-warnings — covers `collectDoctorPreviewNotes`):**
```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/preview-warnings.test.ts --run
 ✓ collects missing default account routing warnings in preview mode
 Test Files  1 passed (1) / Tests  64 passed (64)
```

**Contribution registration (doctor-health-contributions):**
```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --run
 ✓ keeps implemented core health checks owned by ordered doctor contributions
 Test Files  1 passed (1) / Tests  44 passed (44)
```

**Health check contract (doctor-core-checks):**
```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts --run
 Test Files  1 passed (1) / Tests  55 passed (55)
```
target.author: pick-cat

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
